heading: Today
text: A few showers east ending. Patchy fog giving way to some sun in NY, Quebec, western and northern VT. Cloudy east and south.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: A stray evening shower northeast. Clearing, areas of fog.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly to mostly sunny with a stray afternoon shower north.

heading: Thursday
text: Sun giving way to clouds west to east. A chance of afternoon showers west and north.
